title: indigofera heterotricha subsp. heterotricha
intro: Indigofera heterotricha subsp. heterotricha is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the 'prickly metercastor' or 'indigo bush'. It is a shrub native to Africa, used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Indigofera heterotricha subsp. heterotricha include infusion and decoction, often used to treat various ailments, including fever and skin conditions.
